objective: Extend Board A from sampled cross-market/cross-timeframe validation to the stronger full-universe/full-timeframe requirement: every active regime should be tried across all available species/instruments and all available cycles/timeframes before final reporting.

new_requirement_interpretation.full_species: enumerate the provider-available instrument universe by market family, not just the symbols already used by accepted packets
new_requirement_interpretation.full_cycles: enumerate every provider-available timeframe/cycle family and record attempted/pass/fail/unsupported per root
new_requirement_interpretation.completion_standard: do not mark complete from at-least-two-context validation; completion now requires a coverage matrix or an explicit unsupported-provider reason for every main price root x instrument-family x timeframe-family cell; Manipulation is accounted separately as a direct-event overlay gate

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: Named TODO board remains the active contract
Every active main price root has prior >=95 cross-context evidence

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: No provider-universe coverage matrix exists yet for all available symbols/families.

Accepted packets cover 1d/1w for Bull/Bear/Sideways and 15m/1h for Crisis; they do not enumerate all provider-supported bar cycles. Manipulation has chronological event windows but is an overlay, not a bar-cycle root.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: Unsupported provider/timeframe/instrument cells are explicitly explained
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: No full coverage matrix with unsupported reasons exists yet.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: No thresholds relaxed and no trade usability claimed
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: Prior accepted packets and completion audits retain thresholds_relaxed=false and trade_usable=false.

current_coverage_summary.full_universe_status: not a main price root; still needs explicit direct-event universe coverage accounting in the overlay lane

next_actions: Build a provider-universe manifest covering yfinance, IBKR/local cache, Kraken, TradingViewRemix if reachable, and Auto-Quant cache.
Define the timeframe/cycle ladder per provider, including unsupported cells rather than silently skipping them.

Run the first full-universe coverage matrix for the four active main price roots without relaxing thresholds; preserve prior accepted cross-context evidence as baseline only and account for Manipulation separately as an overlay gate.
